pi_items.source: Code analysis: task description, setup_task.sh line 59, export_result.sh line 14, verifier.py implicit expectations
Code analysis: task description line 5, verifier.py line 59 exact match check
Code analysis: task description specifies both users, setup_task.sh creates both users (jsmith: John Smith, mwilson: Maria Wilson), verifier.py lines 71-81 check both members

Web search: Nuxeo REST API documentation confirms endpoint format /nuxeo/api/v1/group/{groupId}. Code analysis: task_utils.sh line 6 defines NUXEO_URL as http://localhost:8080/nuxeo, export_result.sh line 14 constructs full endpoint

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a user group named 'compliance-team' with the label 'Compliance Team' in a Nuxeo Platform system running at http://localhost:8080/nuxeo. The group has two members: 'jsmith' (John Smith) and 'mwilson' (Maria Wilson). The task verifies group creation via the REST API endpoint http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/api/v1/group/compliance-team and checks that the group label and memberUsers fields match expected values. All metadata claims are accurate and internally consistent with the implementation code.
